rationale: The cited paper is used for a specific methodological role rather than as a generic background citation. In the model comparison/robustness section, the authors explicitly reference Thomas (2001) when comparing their preferred Type I Tobit against a Type II Tobit alternative and discussing exclusion restrictions. This citation helps justify the citing paper's modeling choice, even though the citing study does not adopt Thomas's acquisition-retention framework as its core approach.
relation_description: The citing paper uses the cited paper as a methodological benchmark for an alternative Type II Tobit specification in robustness checks. It compares Type I versus Type II Tobit performance and uses that comparison to support its final model choice.
